text.tspan: BULKHEAD: name comes from SHIP DESIGN u2014
ships are divided into watertight compartments so one breach doesn't sink the ship.
Applied to software: isolate resources so one component's failure can't drain shared pools.

g.text: WITH BULKHEAD: separate pools per dependency

text.tspan: Service B's slow calls hold threads.
Queue grows. ALL 200 threads stuck on B.
A and C calls have no threads available.
B's slow calls fill ONLY pool B.
A and C have full 50-thread capacity.
App continues serving requests that don't need B.
